title: 菊花賞の後に・ボクが三冠ウマ娘！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having just crushed the Kikuka Sho, Tokai Teio
thrusts three fingers up in the air.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has become a Triple Crown champion, just
like her beloved Symboli Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her journey isn't over yet. In order to
surpass Symboli Rudolf, Tokai Teio sets her sights
on the spring Tenno Sho.
